message:
Update help documentation and close related beads

Updates CLI help text to document new list command options and syncs
bead tracking state to reflect completed work.

## help.ts Changes

Updated the list command documentation in the help output to include
the new personal prompt filtering options:

Before:
```
list  List all prompts  [--category, --tag, --json]
```

After:
```
list  List all prompts  [--category, --tag, --mine, --saved, --json]
```

This ensures `jfp help` and `jfp --help` accurately reflect all available
options for the list command.

## Beads State Changes

- **jeffreysprompts.com-a4kd** (Update jfp list to include user prompts):
  Status changed from `in_progress` to `closed` with reason
  "Implemented authenticated list flags + merge"

- **jeffreysprompts.com-94r0** (Add search integration for personal prompts):
  Status changed from `open` to `in_progress` - this is the next task
  in the premium features sequence

The list command enhancement (a4kd) is complete. Search integration (94r0)
is now unblocked and ready for implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-94r0","title":"Add search integration for personal prompts in CLI","description":"Add search integration for personal prompts in CLI.

When user is authenticated with premium account, extend search to include:
- User's own prompts (if they have any)
- User's saved prompts
- User's collections (search collection names and descriptions)
- User's prompt notes

Search Flow:
1. Search local prompt registry first (fast, always available)
2. If authenticated, concurrently search premium API endpoints
3. Merge results, marking personal prompts with [personal] tag
4. Display combined results with source indicators

CLI Options:
- jfp search <query> --mine (search only personal prompts)
- jfp search <query> --saved (search only saved prompts)
- jfp search <query> --all (search everything, default for premium users)
- jfp search <query> --local (search only local registry, default for free users)

Graceful Degradation:
- If API unavailable, fall back to local-only search with warning
- If not authenticated, only search local registry (no warning)
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T20:23:10.125806962-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T20:23:47.308475975-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-94r0","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-dio8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T20:24:48.874313433-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- User's own prompts (if they have any)

- User's prompt notes

2. If authenticated, concurrently search premium API endpoints
3. Merge results, marking personal prompts with [personal] tag
4. Display combined results with source indicators

- jfp search <query> --mine (search only personal prompts)
- jfp search <query> --saved (search only saved prompts)
- jfp search <query> --all (search everything, default for premium users)
- jfp search <query> --local (search only local registry, default for free users)

Graceful Degradation:
- If API unavailable, fall back to local-only search with warning
- If not authenticated, only search local registry (no warning)
